current_commit_message: Added exmaple script loading

just deleted some commented out code
Added gain field for spectrum measure
Added gain to spectrum_measure. Deleted some unused code. Fixed layout in form class
Fixed timestamp format and task ending after procedure is finished
Added termination command again
small clean up
Fixed issue with writing hdf5 authors and issue with ramp HolderArgs conversion error
Added global exception handler for asyncio.
Added some egacy commands
Fixed issue with wrong even_loop
Fixed small issue with legacy_protocol. Fixed issue with builder for legacy device. Left side of the device window is now larger by default

Removed flashing for V2 and fixed it for legacy device. Added avrdude.exe for windows. Fixed atf configuration for legacy device. Added atf,atk and att for legacy device. Plot hase some issues with Urms and Frequency line.
Fixed issue with closing the simulation.
added \n as separator, so that it works with linux terminal canonical mode

Added description for procedures and other stuff again. Added a warningbox when starting a procedure or script without capturing. Modified message box to allow **text** to be formatted as bold. Fixed new_scripting so that ProcedureArgs that consist of ProcedureArgs are correctly unpacked. Added examples for procedures for scripting.
Changed name of example procedue script and adjusted the args. Fixed local ramper
Fixed issue with type comparison for Optional[type]. Added a copmment explaining why
